channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: OSINT gets its own subcommittee on House intelligence panel
item.description: The intelligence community has increasingly prioritized OSINT in recent years. Now, House lawmakers are creating a new subcommittee dedicated to the discipline. The post OSINT gets its own subcommittee on House intelligence panel first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: This tiny 2TB portable SSD has a unique feature that makes it the perfect storage companion for your iPhone
item.description: ShiftCam’s Planck SSD delivers lightning-fast storage, perfect for creators capturing 4K ProRes video on their iPhones.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Samsung HBM roadmap shows Google could become Nvidia's fiercest competitor in AI by 2026, but I wonder what's happening to Microsoft
item.description: Samsung’s HBM roadmap shows Nvidia is the top buyer of high-bandwidth memory, followed by Google and Amazon.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — The first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027, two years later than expected when a 12-year deal with Saudi Arabia was signed last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: EU seeks to invest €200 billion in AI
item.description: The European Commission announced the mobilization of €200 billion (about $207 billion) for the InvestAI plan at the AI Action Summit in Paris on Tuesday, with the aim of enabling “open and collaborative development” of artificial intelligence in Europe.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Keen to buy a new gaming laptop with an RTX 5000 GPU? Save the date: Nvidia’s announced pre-orders open on February 25
item.description: Can’t buy an RTX 5080 or 5090 GPU? At least you’ll soon be able to pre-order a gaming laptop with one inside.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Don't fall for that sneaky iCloud storage alert in your inbox
item.description: Beware of iCloud scams using urgent messages. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you spot the red flags to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scientists say several thousand earthquakes detected near Greece's island of Santorini
item.description: Scientists have detected several thousand earthquakes, the vast majority of them with small magnitudes, in just over two weeks near Greece’s volcanic island of Santorini.
item.dc:creator: Elena Becatoros, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Did you turn off Apple Intelligence? Updating to iOS 18.3.1 or macOS 15.3.1 might’ve turned it on again
item.description: iOS 18.3.1 and macOS 15.3.1 bug causing Apple Intelligence to get reactivated despite users switching it off in the past.
item.dc:creator: john-anthony.disotto@futurenet.com (John-Anthony Disotto), TechRadar

item.title: Opinion: Tesla’s awful numbers put Musk back into campaign mode
item.description: Very little looks good on EV company's balance sheet, but Tesla chairman tries every way possible to spark excitement.
item.dc:creator: Liam Denning, The Mercury News

item.title: The 'world's smallest' robot vacuum is now available in a combo version, but for me it defeats the whole point
item.description: The new version adds an integrated stick vacuum for stairs and sofas, but it adds bulk where the selling point was its compact design.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Top Translation Apps for Global Travelers
item.description: Explore the best translation apps for international travel, helping you navigate language barriers and communicate with locals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft Visio cheat sheet: How to get started
item.description: It’s often much easier to convey information with a well-designed diagram than to communicate through a large text blurb. As the old saying goes, “a picture is worth a thousand words.” That’s where Microsoft Visio comes in.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Gcore Radar report reveals 56% year-on-year increase in DDoS attacks
item.description: Gcore, the global edge AI, cloud, network, and security solutions provider, today announced the findings of its Q3-Q4 2024 Radar report into DDoS attack trends.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Elon Musk’s $97 billion OpenAI bid could give the DOGE chief even more power in the AI race
item.description: A group of investors led by Elon Musk has given OpenAI an unsolicited offer of $97.4 billion to buy the nonprofit part of OpenAI. An attorney for the group submitted the bid to OpenAI Monday, the Wall Street Journal reports.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: NASA astronauts are streaming live on Twitch from space. Here’s how to watch
item.description: Ever wondered what life is like for an astronaut? Now you can ask during NASA’s first Twitch event, where astronauts will be broadcasting live from the International Space Station (ISS). The stream is set to take place on Wednesday, February 12, at 11:45 a.m. ET on NASA’s official Twitch channel.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Tiobe Index: Fast Programming Languages Gain Ground, Python Remains Top Spot
item.description: Tiobe's February 2025 rankings show fast programming languages like C++, Go, and Rust gaining ground, but Python remains the leader due to its ease of learning.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Sam Altman says 'no thank you' to Musk-led group's bid for control of OpenAI
item.description: OpenAI CEO and co-founder Sam Altman appeared to shut down a reported offer from an investor group led by Elon Musk to buy the nonprofit that controls OpenAI, marking the latest back-and-forth between the two tech leaders.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Roblox joins $27 million industry nonprofit to support online safety
item.description: A group of internet businesses, including Roblox, Google, OpenAI, and Discord, have cofounded a nonprofit called Robust Open Online Safety Tools (ROOST).
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Congress gets set to deal with artificial intelligence in health care
item.description: "AI is going to help kick in some of that load that the scientists and researchers do at the front end to quickly get a diagnosis," said Deema Tarazi. The post Congress gets set to deal with artificial intelligence in health care first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: FPGAs lose luster in genAI era
item.description: Intel invested $16.7 billion when it bought FPGA maker Altera in 2016, while AMD spent upwards of $35 billion in 2020 to acquire Xilinx, but the vendors have little if anything to show for it.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: NetOps teams ready to dump incumbent monitoring tools
item.description: Replacing a network management tool is not a trivial exercise, especially in large and complex networks. It can take months to install and tune a tool so that it is delivering value.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft Teams is becoming a prime target for sophisticated scammers
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says hackers are using Microsoft Teams for phishing, vishing and quishing via social engineering.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GOP senators terrified of crossing Trump, facing Musk-funded challengers
item.description: GOP senators are terrified over the prospect of facing primary challengers funded by Elon Musk if they stick their necks out by opposing President Trump's agenda.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, The Hill

item.title: Google’s generative AI Toolbox for Databases to help connect agents with databases
item.description: Google’s cloud computing division, Google Cloud, has added a new generative AI Toolbox for Databases to help enterprise developers connect agent-based generative AI applications to its databases.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Never lose cell service again with this space-age satellite tech
item.description: AST SpaceMobile of Texas is developing the world's first global cellular broadband network that can connect directly to your smartphone without special equipment.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Latino workers working to overcome a technological divide brought on by automation, AI
item.description: As jobs become more reliant on technology some Latino workers can be left behind due to a lack of digital skills exacerbated by a lack of accessibility.
item.dc:creator: FERNANDA FIGUEROA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: Java Development Kit (JDK) 24 has entered the release candidate stage. The next version of standard Java will ship with 24 features, ranging from a class-file API to a fourth preview of structured concurrency. The first JDK 24 release candidate arrived February 6, following two rampdown stages.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amazon to pay nearly $4M to settle lawsuit alleging it took tips from drivers
item.description: Amazon has agreed to pay nearly $4 million to settle charges that the e-commerce company subsidized its labor costs by taking tips its delivery drivers received from customers, District of Columbia Attorney General Brian L. Schwalb said Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: GitHub Copilot previews agent mode
item.description: GitHub has added new capabilities to its GitHub Copilot AI-powered coding assistant, including a preview of a new agent mode capable of iterating on its own code. The company also announced the general availability of Copilot Edits in Visual Studio Code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI looks across US for sites to build its Trump-backed Stargate AI data centers
item.description: OpenAI is scouring the U.S. for sites to build a network of huge data centers to power its artificial intelligence technology, expanding beyond a flagship Texas location and looking across 16 states to accelerate the Stargate project championed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: GSA plans moving staff to Interior headquarters, as its tech shop anticipates more shakeups
item.description: GSA senior leaders are saying the Trump administration’s long-term goal is to merge GSA, OPM and OMB into a single agency. The post GSA plans moving staff to Interior headquarters, as its tech shop anticipates more shakeups first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Nebraska government system shutdown disrupts the Legislature, DMV and other offices
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A systemwide outage of state goverment computers shut down everything from the work of the Legislature to driver’s licensing offices for several hours Thursday.
item.dc:creator: MARGERY A. BECK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Smart windows take a page from nature's pinecone playbook
item.description: An innovative new window system keeps your home comfortable without using a single watt of electricity and could change the way we think about energy efficiency in buildings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
